case_title: KONIUK, WAYNE VS MUNICIPAL RAILWAY et al

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,627.80 FILED BY KONIUK, WAYNE AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S OFFICE ATT: CLAIMS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-19-1997 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT C
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S OFFICE ATT: CLAIMS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-14-1998, GRANTED
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S OFFICE ATT: CLAIMS HEARING SET FOR JAN-14-1998 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONIUK, WAYNE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY $2,052.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,067.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF KONIUK, WAYNE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MUNICIPAL RAILWAY CONTROLLER'S OFFICE ATT: CLAIMS STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
